title: Validate and harden the first GPX archive slice
acceptance_criteria: Regression tests cover unsupported entries, malformed GPX, and duplicate-import edge cases for the first slice
The first slice has an explicit verification path documented with cargo fmt --check, cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings, and cargo test --all
The first slice is ready to land independently of KML, Ozi text, and ozf2 work
